response_constraints: Do not claim any result not established by a tool response.
Keep each call's result separate; do not transfer identifiers or fields between calls.
Report the retrieved record, availability result, and filtered list as distinct findings.
Return exactly three bullets and include every record ID returned by the tools.
state_assertions: Persistent simulator state is unchanged by the read-only calls.

stages.purpose: Call messaging_get, messaging_availability, and messaging_list together; every argument is user-supplied, so no call consumes another call's result.

prompt: For the communications queue review, run three independent read-only checks in one assistant action: retrieve mes-264; check whether "Schedule Change Notice" is available on 2026-11-11 in Volunteers; and list active messages in Volunteers. Do not create, update, cancel, or notify any record. Keep the final answer to exactly three bullets and include every record ID returned by the tools.
